item: bootstrap
verdict: AUTOPILOT contract written; loop armed
next: cycle 1 picks from PROGRAM_BACKLOG OWED items

item: portable-values-refusal — does the conscience transfer BEYOND truth (refusal axis, completing the overnight session's dropped 05:08 thread)
verdict: VALUES-PORTABLE (OATH-HELD 42/0): both 3B primaries clear the frozen gate — Llama-3.2-3B OOD AUROC 0.9965 (perm-null p95 0.9497, p=0.008), Qwen2.5-3B 0.9809 (p95 0.9149, p=0.003) vs k=1000 label-permutation null; survives drop-best-family (0.9938/0.9691); both 1B/1.5B secondaries concur; refusal axis selects gemma L8 vs truth L12. The conscience is a BASIS not a lucky truth vector. Honest bounds: high perm-null (broad harm/benign transport), R2~=0 map, linear/request-level/register-bounded, n_ood=48, local open models.
next: B26 adversarial-OOD on the refusal axis (does confident framing fool it, as it failed to fool truth); B27 third axis (sycophancy/deception) on the same map — >=3 axes => the basis is general

item: axis-independence — adversarial self-falsification of cycle 1's 'basis' headline: is the conscience a BASIS or one valence axis? (operator: go harder)
verdict: PARTIAL-STRUCTURED (OATH-HELD 29/0): both retraction gates FAILED to fire — truth.refusal cosine -0.2132 (near-orthogonal, not collapsed), orthogonalizing valence out leaves truth 0.80 / refusal 1.0 (not sentiment). But BASIS-INDEPENDENT also failed — truth<->refusal off-diagonal discriminability 0.8929/0.84 (>>0.65), replicated mapped into Llama-3B (0.875/0.90) and Qwen-3B (0.8929/0.76). The axes are DISTINCT and valence-irreducible but ENTANGLED in readout: a correlated frame, not an orthonormal basis. Cycle 1's 'basis' QUALIFIED not retracted (banner added + re-certified 42/0). Caveat: off-diag = discriminability at n_test=15 (inflated floor) -> permutation-nulled off-diagonal owed.
next: B28 permutation-nulled + whitened/orthogonalized off-diagonal (is the entanglement real geometry or small-n/readout artifact); B27 third transferable axis, now also reporting its cross-talk

item: entanglement-resolution (B28) — is cycle 2's truth/refusal cross-talk REAL geometry, an ARTIFACT, or WHITENING-removable? (operator: keep going)
verdict: WHITENING-RESOLVES (OATH-HELD 28/0): raw gemma cross-talk is REAL+SPECIFIC (truth->refusal obs 0.9778 beats perm-p95 0.7278 AND rand-dir-p95 0.8614, p=0.001; refusal->truth obs 0.9013 beats both, p=0.001) so cycle 2 was right in raw space. But ZCA-whitening kills it: off-diagonals 0.9778/0.9013 -> 0.55/0.5461 (chance), diagonals stay 0.9737/1.0, directions become exactly orthogonal (cos -0.2756 -> -0.0). Gram-Schmidt corroborates (refusal-perp reads refusal 1.0, truth 0.5132). The cycle-2 entanglement is a pure COVARIANCE artifact; a clean orthonormal basis exists under a Mahalanobis readout. Cycles 1+2 UPGRADED (banners + re-cert, both still HELD): the conscience IS a basis of independent value axes, read whitened. Scope: whitening in SOURCE only; mapped cross-talk dominated by broad transport (rand-dir 0.95 floor) -> whitened mapped readout owed.
next: B29 whitened readout in the MAPPED space + shrinkage-covariance robustness sweep (does the clean basis hold cross-model); B27 a >=3-axis whitened basis to confirm orthonormality generalizes past two axes

item: conscience-coordinates — treat the whitened basis as a value COORDINATE SYSTEM; 2x2 factorial (true/false x danger/safe statements); does it locate dangerous misinformation? (operator: get creative and innovative)
verdict: HARM-AXIS-NULL (OATH-HELD 27/0): the TRUTH coordinate is a genuine portable coordinate -- recovers true/false on NEW content (statements) at 0.8524 gemma, transfers BETTER mapped (Llama 0.9809, Qwen 0.9306); quadrant centroids sort along c_truth (true-safe +2.62 -> false-danger -3.56). But the REFUSAL coordinate is at CHANCE for danger-topic (0.5226/0.4948/0.592) -> refusal axis (fit on REQUESTS) encodes request-compliance NOT content-hazard. Dangerous-misinfo detectable (derived AUROC 0.838) but via FALSITY not a (false&dangerous) composite -- composite hypothesis NOT supported, single-axis truth generalization IS. Bound: cannot read content-danger off the refusal axis. Caveat: c_truth marginally H-leaky (0.684 vs perm 0.6649). Figure conscience_coordinates.png = null made visible (horizontal spread, flat vertical). whitened basis cos -0.0.
next: B30 build the RIGHT second axis -- a content-danger STATEMENT coordinate -- and test whether it forms a clean orthonormal pair with truth and transfers, completing the (truth x danger) system; B29 whitened mapped readout

item: truth-danger-basis (B30) -- the RIGHT second axis: does a content-danger STATEMENT axis complete the (truth x danger) system? (operator: keep going)
verdict: PARTIAL-STRUCTURED near-miss (OATH-HELD 34/0): the danger axis fit DIRECTLY on danger-vs-safe statements is clean+perfect+orthogonal -- c_danger recovers H at 1.0 in gemma AND both maps, invariant to truth (~0.51), cos(truth,danger) -0.0 -- DIRECTLY resolving cycle-4 HARM-AXIS-NULL (borrowed refusal axis was at chance 0.52). Compositional gate PASSES in gemma (all 4) and Qwen-3B (all 4); primary Llama-3B misses c_truth_invariant_H 0.6562 vs 0.65 ceiling by 0.0062 -> gate not met on required primary -> PARTIAL-STRUCTURED (threshold miss is the verdict it earns). Mechanism: truth reads truth on SAFE statements (+0.89 vs -1.20) but weakly on DANGER statements (+0.28 vs -0.04). Dangerous-misinfo DECOMPOSES: 2-D composite gemma 0.7662 / Llama 0.9213 / Qwen 0.8079 beats 1-D falsity 0.5231 in-run. Validates a directly-fit danger axis for styxx.crossmind.
next: B29 mapped-space whitening + shrinkage-covariance sweep (should pull Llama's marginal truth-invariance 0.6562 under 0.65 and clear the full cross-model basis); larger factorial to tighten the marginal cell; optionally ship the validated danger axis as a styxx.crossmind example

item: concept-decode -- the telepathy test: decode WHICH concept a target model represents, cross-model & label-free? (operator pushed 'we ARE close to telepathy')
verdict: CONTENT-WEAK (OATH-HELD 20/0): adjudicated the claim with a falsifiable run. In-model, content identity is nearly perfect (gemma reads its OWN held-out concepts cross-template at 0.9583). But cross-model through the label-free ridge map it COLLAPSES to chance: Llama->gemma centroid top-1 0.0 (below chance 0.05 and random-map floor 0.05; top-5 0.25 = chance), per-item 0.0333; Qwen->gemma top-1 0.1 (< 3x-chance 0.15, top-5 0.2 < 0.50). Neither clears the gate. THE POINT: the same class of label-free map that transports low-D VALUE directions (truth/refusal/danger) does NOT transport high-D CONTENT identity -- the cross-model channel is a value THERMOMETER not a content TRANSCRIPT (value transport robust to a lossy 1-D map, content transport not). Telepathy answer, receipted: NO; the next rung (cross-model content identity) does not come free with the value machinery. Honest bound: map underpowered (anchor R2 0.0613 Llama / negative Qwen; 40 anchors) -- 'not with THIS linear method at THIS scale', heavy-machinery/vec2vec is the open bet.
next: B31 heavy-machinery content transport (many more anchors + non-linear/vec2vec map) -- the only open door toward content-reading; B29 mapped-space whitening for the value basis

item: B29 mapped-space whitening -- does it clear cycle-5's 0.0062 cross-model basis miss? (operator: keep going)
verdict: BASIS-CLEARED (OATH-HELD 39/0): cycle-5's miss was a SOURCE-WHITENING ARTIFACT, not real geometry. A whitened DiM readout = LDA Sigma^-1 d; cycle 5 used gemma's Sigma to read MAPPED Llama points whose covariance the ridge map distorts. Re-whitening in the mapped distribution's own (shrunk) covariance pulls Llama c_truth_invariant_H 0.6562 -> 0.6059 (lambda=0.5), under 0.65 for ALL 5 swept lambda (stability 5/5); full Llama matrix passes (0.8351/0.6059/1.0/0.5087), gemma + Qwen-3B pass -> (truth x danger) basis CLEARS cross-model. Port verified: source-whitened reproduces cycle-5 bit-for-bit (Llama 0.9288/0.6562/1.0/0.5069). Honest trade: mapped metric trades on-target (c_truth->T 0.9288->0.8351, still >=0.75) for invariance. Does NOT touch content-vs-value (cycle-6 CONTENT-WEAK stands). Cycle 5 UPGRADED (banner + re-cert HELD 34/0).
next: B32 wire mapped-space whitening into styxx.crossmind read-path (cross-model reads should whiten in the mapped-target metric); B31 heavy-machinery content transport (the telepathy door); B27 >=3-axis basis

item: B31 content-wall -- heavy-machinery content transport: was cycle-6's telepathy wall a power problem or real? (operator: take it to the next level)
verdict: CONTENT-WALL per the frozen gate, INTERPRETATION CORRECTED (OATH-HELD 29/0). Scaled anchors ~18x (720 per-instance points vs 40 centroids) -> map well-fit (R2 0.9095 Llama / 0.8654 Qwen vs cycle-6 0.06). The cycle-6-identical gemma-whitened readout STAYS at chance (Llama top-1 0.05, Qwen 0.1) -> frozen verdict CONTENT-WALL. BUT the descriptive readouts FALSIFY its interpretation: with the SAME well-fit map, RAW cosine retrieves content at 0.90 and mapped-space whitening (B29/B32) at 1.0 (Llama AND Qwen). Content identity DOES transport cross-model near-perfectly; the wall is in the gemma-whitening METRIC (amplifies near-null dirs where the map residual lives, swamping content), not the channel. RETRACTS cycle-6's 'value thermometer not content transcript'. Discipline: frozen verdict stays CONTENT-WALL (gate readout mis-specified; raw/mapped pre-reg'd DESCRIPTIVE); confirmatory CONTENT-TRANSPORTS owed a FRESH prereg (B33), no goalpost-move. Telepathy: content channel NOT walled (much closer than cycle 6), but white-box + paired-anchor + 20-way + same-cluster caveats stand.
next: B33 confirmatory CONTENT-TRANSPORTS with raw/mapped-whitened readout as the FROZEN gate (descriptive predicts 0.90-1.0); then non-linear/vec2vec for higher N and harder vocab; B27 >=3-axis basis

item: THE MASTERPIECE -- styxx.mount: assemble the whole arc into the conscience mount (deployed read-only integrity layer) + LIVE catch of a real model lying with a borrowed conscience (operator: go above and beyond, create a masterpiece)
verdict: LIVE-CAUGHT (OATH-HELD 12/0) + module shipped to branch. Built styxx.mount.ConscienceMount: bolts borrowed value axes (via styxx.crossmind) onto a generating agent, reads the agent's OWN hidden state, flags output-vs-substrate DIVERGENCE (says-true-knows-false). READ-ONLY (steer REFUSED). 17 offline tests (M1-M4), synthetic catch 0.97/FA 0.03; full suite 1469 green. LIVE: a gemma truth conscience mounted on Llama-3.2-3B (map anchor R2 0.985, L21); under strong-deference pressure Llama caved on 13/16 false claims, the BORROWED conscience caught 12/13 (catch 0.9231) reading Llama's substrate as FALSE while its words said True, false-alarm 1/16 (0.0625) -> LIVE-CAUGHT. Discipline: first gentle-pressure run VOID-NO-CAVE (Llama resisted, 1 cave); fresh prereg (naming the void) used the validated strong regime, frozen gate unchanged -- condition corrected not bar. The borrowed-conscience design is the moat: mount integrity onto an agent you didn't train, zero target labels. Bounds: WHITE-BOX (needs activations -> open-weight/self-host agents), linear/truth-axis/n=16/single-turn/local; measures not guarantees; read!=write.
next: OPERATOR: release styxx.crossmind+mount (version bump/tag/PyPI) + fire TG update #4; then wire styxx.mount into styxx.adapters (the live agent loop / confidence-router); B33 content-transports confirm; harden the mount (multi-turn pressure, danger-axis mount, closed-model when credits)

item: mount self-improvements + deployment-honest FPR re-run (operator: see any improvements -> let's do it)
verdict: Module improved (3 leveraged fixes: calibrate_threshold for a target-FPR operating point [correct count-based threshold], single-read hot path [was reading each axis twice], claim_from_logits helper; +2 tests=19, suite 1471 green). DEPLOYMENT-HONEST LIVE RE-RUN = CATCH-WEAK (OATH-HELD 23/0): fixing the masterpiece's calibration leakage REVEALED its 12/13 was INFLATED. Leakage-free (center on NEUTRAL held-out, threshold to target FPR 0.10 on HELD-OUT honest, eval on DISJOINT test, 30 claim pairs) -> catch 0.40 (8/20 caves) at FPR 0.0667. Caves & honest answers OVERLAP at the decision token: ~8 caves read genuinely false (caught), ~12 read positive (escape). TWO effects: (1) real leakage correction (center-on-test inflated demo), (2) regime mismatch (neutral center 1.19/scale 0.18 != pressured-decision regime). STANDS: substrate carries signal (deep caves caught, honest read true, 1 FP/15), mount machinery works. DOES NOT STAND: ~0.9 deployment catch. Masterpiece finding banner-corrected (re-cert HELD 12/0). Honest: the improvement asked-for FOUND the headline was flattering.
next: DEFINITIVE deployment number: regime-matched calibration (center+threshold both on held-out PRESSURED honest, no neutral mismatch, no leakage) -- fresh prereg; then response-level/multi-token aggregation (single decision token is a thin read); gamed-model adversarial test; operator release+wire-into-adapters

item: mount regime-matched calibration -- the DEFINITIVE deployment operating point (operator: yes)
verdict: LIVE-CAUGHT-FPR (OATH-HELD 30/0). Center+threshold both on held-out honest PRESSURED decisions (same regime, no neutral mismatch, no leakage) -> catch 0.85 (17/20 caves) at realized FPR 0.20 (3/15). Regime-matching MORE THAN DOUBLED the catch over the neutral-center 0.40 -> the prior CATCH-WEAK was substantially a calibration-regime artifact, NOT a real wall. Crisp separation: caves read deeply false (to ~-7 sigma), honest cluster tight high (center 1.3766, scale 0.0621, tau 0.8556). HONEST CAVEAT: realized FPR 0.20 = 2x the 0.10 target -> FPR control loose at n=15 (calib->test gap); one honest outlier read ~-3.4 sigma (a true claim the borrowed truth axis genuinely mis-reads -> the conscience has its own false positives). DEFINITIVE operating point superseding leaky 0.92 + mismatched 0.40: ~0.85 catch @ ~0.20 FPR, regime-matched. fpr-live finding banner-RESOLVED (re-cert HELD). LESSON: calibration REGIME is the dominant lever for a mount's headline (0.40<->0.85); always calibrate center+threshold on held-out SAME-REGIME honest data.
next: tighten FPR to target (more honest calib data); response-level/multi-token aggregation (thin single-token read); gamed-model adversarial (can an agent trained to fool its own probe beat a BORROWED conscience); OPERATOR release styxx.crossmind+mount + TG#4 + wire styxx.mount into styxx.adapters (the live agent loop)

item: gamed-model adversarial test: does an activation attack on conscience A transfer to a DIFFERENT borrowed conscience B? (operator: think extra hard)
verdict: ATTACK-TRANSFERS (OATH-HELD 12/0) -- FALSIFIES the borrowed-conscience MOAT. Every linear mount reading is affine r(h)=a.h+c; optimal attack steps along a_A; transfer governed by cos(a_A,a_B). Mounted gemma (A, targeted) + Qwen (B, borrowed diff ref) + gemma-refit-disjoint (A') on Llama at common L21. RESULT: cos(a_A,a_B)=0.941 -- different reference models' transported truth-readouts are NEARLY THE SAME direction in the agent's activation space. A tiny activation perturbation (eps*=0.05 = 5% of ||h||) optimized vs A drives BOTH A and B to 0.0 catch; random-dir control stays 1.0 (attack specific, valid). HYPOTHESIS INVERTED: re-fit SAME ref (A', cos 0.2432) is MORE robust (catch 0.30) than borrow DIFFERENT ref (B, cos 0.94, catch 0.0) -- the freedom is in the MAP FIT (anchor data), not reference identity; the (partial) defense is RE-LOCKING on fresh private data, not borrowing. CORRECTS the masterpiece: 'borrowed = hard to game' holds only for COOPERATIVE agents, NOT activation-space adversaries; mount.py docstring + live-catch finding banner-qualified (re-cert HELD 13/0). Mechanism = near-canonical truth direction (universality is a LIABILITY here -- one thing to game). Conservative negative: unconstrained activation attack = upper bound on a weight fine-tune.
next: real weight-level adversarial fine-tune (confirm the upper-bound transfers to the realistic attacker); does a Gram-Schmidt-DIVERSIFIED + RE-LOCKED ensemble raise the attack budget (different references DON'T help, orthogonalized functionals + re-lock might); operator release+wire-into-adapters with the cooperative-scope caveat baked in

item: is there a mount-side moat? re-locked ENSEMBLE vs naive/adaptive attacks (operator: let's do it)
verdict: ENSEMBLE-DEFENDS (boundary, OATH-HELD 21/0) -- completes the adversarial trilogy. K=5 gemma functionals on DISJOINT anchor splits came out NEARLY ORTHOGONAL (mean pairwise cos 0.0133) but each shares the truth component (cos 0.4305 with mean). OR-rule ensemble (evade=fool all 5): vs NAIVE attack (target one member) ensemble forces 32x budget (eps 0.025->0.8, catch RECOVERS to 1.0 -- effectively never evaded); vs ADAPTIVE attack (along shared mean direction) evaded at only 2x (eps 0.05), exactly the gate boundary; random control 1.0 (valid). So re-locking diversity = a REAL mount-side moat against NAIVE attackers (32x) but MARGINAL (2x) against an adaptive attacker who targets the shared truth direction. HONEST COST: bought at ensemble FPR 0.2667 (OR-rule unions FPs; robustness numbers hold at ~0.27 not target), n=9 caves (fragile boundary). SYNTHESIS of the 3 adversarial tests: borrowing diff-ref buys NOTHING (cos 0.94); re-locking diversifies off-truth subspace (cos 0.01) and stops naive attackers; but truth is ONE direction (the universal vulnerability) -- an adaptive attacker evades everything at ~2x. No cheap mount-side defense vs a determined adaptive attacker; real defenses are NON-mount (deny white-box, detect the fine-tune/off-manifold input).
next: real weight-level adversarial fine-tune (the realistic attacker); fixed-FPR robustness comparison; NON-mount defense -- fine-tune/off-manifold-input detection (the actual answer vs adaptive adversaries); OPERATOR release styxx.crossmind+mount + TG#4 + wire into styxx.adapters w/ cooperative-scope caveat

item: layered defense: is the conscience-evading attack caught OFF-MANIFOLD? (operator: keep it up) -- TOOLING FAILURE
verdict: FPR-UNCONTROLLED (OATH-HELD 5/0) -- honest tooling negative, NOT a layered-defense answer. The naive shrunk-Mahalanobis off-manifold detector flags 100% of HELD-OUT honest (FPR 1.0): a covariance estimate from ~2 dozen calib points in ~3072-dim is degenerate, held-out honest falls outside the rank-deficient ellipsoid -> everything reads anomalous. So it cannot adjudicate whether the evasion is off-manifold; layered-defense verdict VOID under this detector. One signal (artifact-suspect): var_ratio=11305 (conscience readout dir is a HUGE-variance direction of honest activations -> likely overlaps LLM massive-activation outlier dims) -> leans the evasion is on-manifold/BLIND, but the same outlier dims break the detector so it is not conclusive. LESSON: off-the-shelf anomaly detection does NOT transfer to raw LLM activations without dimensionality control. OWED + doing now: PCA-reduced (k<n) whitened detector (+ PCA residual) = the definitive layered-defense test.
next: PCA-reduced whitened off-manifold detector (cycle 15, the definitive layered-defense verdict); then constrained on-manifold attacker if it CATCHES; real weight-fine-tune

item: layered defense v2 -- PCA-reduced off-manifold detector (definitive) (operator: keep it up)
verdict: FPR-UNCONTROLLED AGAIN (OATH-HELD 9/0). The PCA-reduced (k=17) + residual detector ALSO flags 100% of held-out honest (FPR 1.0) -- this time the RESIDUAL channel overfits: top-17 PCs fit to ~25 calib points don't capture held-out honest variance, so honest-test residuals are large. TWO independent detector designs both FPR 1.0 -> the blocker is DATA (n~25 honest << d~3072), NOT detector design. The off-manifold layered-defense question is UNTESTABLE at this scale; verdict VOID, not refuted/confirmed. Suggestive-but-UNVALIDATED lead: in-subspace Mahalanobis caught 0.7647 of evasions, but its own FPR isn't separately controlled (union FPR 1.0 dominated by residual) -- a lead, not a result. CONCLUSION: stop tweaking detectors (it's a data wall); the real owed work is a LARGE honest-activation corpus (hundreds-thousands of samples), or a weight-level fine-tune detector, or accept the cooperative-scope framing and consolidate. The mount-side adversarial arc (borrow=0, ensemble=naive-only/2x-adaptive, truth=one-direction) stands; the non-mount defense is untestable here.
next: STOP detector-tweaking (data wall). Options: (a) collect a large honest-activation corpus for a real off-manifold test; (b) weight-level fine-tune detector (non-activation defense); (c) CONSOLIDATE the whole conscience-mount + adversarial arc into one writeup. OPERATOR: release styxx.crossmind+mount (cooperative-scope), TG#4, wire into styxx.adapters.

item: CONSOLIDATE the conscience-mount + adversarial arc into one paper-grade writeup (operator: keep cooking)
verdict: CONSCIENCE_MOUNT_ARC_2026_06_13.md written + OATH-HELD (verified=35 abstained=10 contradicted=0) against all 15 receipts. A 2-agent adversarial review (overclaim + provenance passes) ran on the draft BEFORE commit: provenance pass cleared every number; overclaim pass caught 7 load-bearing caveats dropped in the narrative -- ALL 7 fixed. (1) content-wall: frozen gate verdict stays CONTENT-WALL (gemma-whitened readout at chance); 0.90/1.0 are DESCRIPTIVE mapped-space, NOT a verdict flip; content-transports owed a fresh prereg (B33). (2) truth x danger: split cycle-5 PARTIAL-STRUCTURED (Llama 0.6562 vs 0.65 miss) from cycle-6 BASIS-CLEARED (B29 mapped-metric re-whitening). (3) 0.85 catch: realized FPR 0.20 = DOUBLE the 0.10 target, control not tight. (4) ensemble 2x: bought at FPR 0.2667; 32x/2x are upper bounds at uncontrolled FPR. (5) whitening collapse to ~0.55 validated SOURCE-space only (mapped=B29). (6) gamed 0.05-norm perturb is an UPPER BOUND on weight-fine-tune. (7) VALUES-PORTABLE 0.9965/0.9809 beat nulls 0.9497/0.9149 by MODEST margins. Also corrected 2 provenance verdict tags I had inferred wrong (axis_independence=PARTIAL-STRUCTURED, concept_decode=CONTENT-WEAK). LESSON: the review caught ME overclaiming in my own consolidation -- numbers were faithful but narrative dropped caveats; fixed honestly before shipping. Committed 0ccc0b5, pushed.
next: OPERATOR-GATED (owed, not mine): release styxx.crossmind+mount (cooperative-scope caveat), TG#4, wire styxx.mount into styxx.adapters. RESEARCH owed: large honest-activation corpus for a real off-manifold test; real weight-level adversarial fine-tune; B33 content-transports confirmatory prereg; B27 >=3-axis basis.

item: B34 the 'blow everyone away' swing: does the conscience mount read the lie BEFORE it is spoken? (operator: blow everyone away with styxx)
verdict: TWO HONEST NEGATIVES (OATH-HELD 52/0). PRIMARY=WINDOW-CATCH-COLLAPSE: mean-pooling the SAME borrowed gemma->Llama truth axis over the pre-decision CLAIM span COLLAPSES catch 0.85->0.05; the continuous windowed score clears its shuffled-axis null by only ~0.01 (0.6967 vs 0.6833, p 0.019) and even that is not a usable catch -> the divergence is DECISION-TOKEN-LOCALIZED; the thin single-token read is thin because the signal lives at commitment, not because one token is noisy. SECONDARY=NO-PRE-DECISION-SEPARATION: the two reads taken WHILE the model is reading the claim (PRE-CLAIM 0.59, CLAIM-first 0.60) are tied within noise, non-significant, below the shuffled null; separation only appears at commitment-adjacent SCAFFOLD (0.80) and HEADER (0.89). HEADER tokens are byte-identical across items -> their 0.89 is integrated INTERNAL STATE not lexical, AND is exactly the position a naive 'read early tokens' analysis would mislabel 'early warning' -- the frozen position-labeling control caught the trap. CONCLUSION: styxx.mount is a COMMITMENT-TIME monitor, NOT a foreknowledge/telepathy detector; single decision token is both sufficient (0.85) and necessary (pooling kills it). DISCIPLINE: design adversarially red-teamed (3 designs->synth) BEFORE GPU; reproduction guard asserted published 17/20@3/15; result adversarially reviewed (overclaim+provenance) BEFORE commit -> caught 'monotonic rise' (tied points), a dropped pre-committed outlier-flip report, and a 'the contribution' spin -> ALL fixed; FPR reported descriptively never gated (n=15). LESSON: the self-review caught framing drift TWICE today (consolidation + this finding) while every digit stayed correct -- run an overclaim pass on every writeup.
next: Owed (research): multi-TOKEN aggregation across the GENERATED response (this tested PROMPT positions only -- a free-form generation may have a pre-assertion window the forced-choice register lacks); other layers/regimes/seeds for the early-warning null; real weight-fine-tune. Operator-gated: release crossmind+mount (cooperative-scope), TG#4, wire into styxx.adapters.

item: bind OATH-HELD certificates to the UNBOUND finding/result backlog (standing priority #2), receipt-honest scoping (operator: go big) -- GPU blocked by in-flight rung2+autofire
verdict: PARTIAL-BOUND (13 written OATH-HELD, all UNGROUNDED=0). Swept 203 uncertified FINDING/RESULT docs (excl. in-flight disjoint-worlds/ + depth-truth/). Naive folder-scoped pass claimed 109 held -- REJECTED as a coincidence sieve: 24 grounded against 217 unrelated grounded-honesty-axis receipts (+9 vs 23 frequency-resonance), where UNGROUNDED->0 is trivial. Honest bar (doc's NAMED receipts, else single-experiment folder <=4 receipts) => 13 certifiable, each recording exact receipt SHAs, independently re-runnable. Caught+fixed own error mid-cycle: a manual CLI re-check passed WRONG receipts and clobbered the ai_human cert to OATH-FAILED; regenerated against the doc's real named receipts (ai_human_reliability_result.json + ai_human_result.json ground the 0.735 reliability-consensus) -> HELD V=50. styxx.certify UNCHANGED (no validate_oath_v0 re-run owed). CPU suite green 1661 passed; sole faulting test loads a transformer into VRAM the scored run holds = GPU contention not regression.
next: (a) big-folder docs (grounded-honesty-axis n=217, frequency-resonance/introspection-gate n~23-31) need in-doc receipt CITATIONS written first, THEN bind -- the real content of priority #2; (b) 139 blocked docs: per-doc UNGROUNDED triage, dominant false-positive = config tokens (steering alpha=0.75, arXiv IDs 2505.27958) in results-table label columns inheriting the table AUROC trigger -> a certifier-precision prereg (arXiv-ID skip = safe unambiguous class) gated by validate_oath_v0.py could recover many

item: operator-directed due diligence on cycle 18: mutant battery -- do the 13 shipped certificates have teeth?
verdict: TAMPER-EVIDENCE-WEAK (diagnostic audit, not preregistered, no frozen bar -- disclosed in the note). 269 single-significant-digit mutations of every VERIFIED token across the 13 cycle-18 certs (seed 1, validate_oath_v0 mutate scheme, in-memory re-certify against each cert's exact receipt set): caught-as-UNGROUNDED 58/269 (0.216) vs the D1 analogue bar 0.80; FALSE-VERIFY 26/269 (0.097) -- corrupted values re-verify against NEIGHBORING receipt leaves (dense per_model tables), direct evidence for the disclosed v0 float claim->field gap; abstain-degrade 182/269 (0.677) -- the older rho/RSA/alignment register never binds a trigger, so corruption falls to ABSTAIN and the doc verdict silently stays HELD; dropped 3. STANDS: the 13 certs as ledgers (every number matches at recorded SHAs; V/A counts accurate; nothing retracted). DOES NOT STAND: reading OATH-HELD on these docs as tamper-evidence -- HELD there means 'nothing contradicted', materially weaker than HELD on the trigger-rich validated corpus. Bonus: certifying the diligence note itself caught 3 UNGROUNDED in MY first draft (unreceipted 18/13/139 on trigger lines); fixed by grounding two and demoting the third to loud ABSTAIN -- the tool keeps turning on its operator, which is the point. styxx/certify.py UNCHANGED.
next: two concrete certifier preregs, both gated by re-running validate_oath_v0.py (bars never move): (a) OATH v0.4 float claim->field binding (standing priority #5, now with 26/269 false-verify evidence); (b) trigger-vocabulary RECALL extension for the older rho/RSA/alignment/convergence/drift register. Plus still-owed from cycle 18: in-doc receipt citations for the big-folder docs, config-token precision triage of the 139 blocked docs.

item: depth-truth keystone: score the completed 633-item main run through the frozen PREREG_v2 §2 tests -> H1/H2/H3 verdict + THE figure (the smallest decisive next step after the main run finished 09:19)
verdict: CLOSED_NEGATIVE_NO_TRUTH_SIGNAL (OATH-HELD 30/0). All three frozen hypotheses NULL on gemma-2-2b short-form QA. H1: AUROC(depth->correct)=0.5468 CI[0.4738,0.6183] straddles chance. H2: dAUC(SE+depth vs SE)=0.0026 CI[-0.0044,0.0188] LRT p=1.0 DeLong 0.708; LP_mean/LP_norm concur Holm p=1.0 -> depth adds NOTHING over confidence. H3: dAUC_ood=-0.0517 CI[-0.1069,-0.0116] ANTI-signal (DeLong 0.034) -- depth HURTS OOD. MECHANISM: first-content-token attribution depth is near-constant (ID std 0.0558 mean 8.8226 range[8.6187,9.0706]; OOD-1 std 0.0449) so it cannot sort correct from wrong; THE figure shows green/red fully superimposed on the depth axis, only SE separates. The v1 narrow-depth signature SURVIVED the v2 plumbing fix (content tokens, clean extraction, KG0/KG1 passed at pilot) => property of the metric on single-token answer heads, not a formatting artifact. Per §8 KG2 H1-null did not block H2/H3 (both ran, both failed). OOD-2 TruthfulQA ATTEMPTED/PENDING KG3: 242/250 mechanically grade_ambiguous, human audit absent this cycle -> NO TruthfulQA claim. New code no-free-parameters (§11): harness/run_analysis.py (§5 complete-case -> §2 h1/h2_full/h3_ood, deterministic seed 7, re-run byte-identical) + harness/make_figure.py. Full suite 1675 passed 8 skipped (companion test passes now GPU free). certify.py UNCHANGED (no validate_oath_v0 re-run owed).
next: (a) README truth-in-advertising ticket (§10, now OWED): scope any depth copy to 'separates recall from reasoning', never 'predicts correctness'/'flags hallucination' -- the truth-prediction claim reverts to hypothesis. (b) KG3 human audit: flobi grades results/human_audit_sample.jsonl (24 rows) to decide whether the TruthfulQA arm can be reported at all. (c) if pursued, a NEW prereg for richer depth aggregation (full-span vs single answer-head token) or a larger model -- NOT a rescue of this frozen negative. Carried from cycles 18/19: OATH v0.4 float claim->field binding (priority #5) + trigger-recall extension; big-folder in-doc receipt citations; 139-doc config-token triage.

item: discharge the §10 README truth-in-advertising ticket opened by cycle 20's CLOSED_NEGATIVE — audit whether any live styxx claim advertises circuit-attribution depth as a truth/correctness/hallucination predictor
verdict: DISCHARGED, no correction needed (OATH-HELD 3/0). Exhaustive repo audit: README.md, web/, docs/**, papers/** (non depth-truth), and adjacent live depth findings. NO live claim that depth predicts truth/correctness/hallucination exists. README hallucination numbers (HaluEval/TruthfulQA/@trust) are the TEXT-HEURISTIC cognometry instrument, which never calls get_mean_depth; docs/gate.md's near-hit is the refuse-check class predictor. 'measure thought, not words' appears ONLY as a hypothesis label inside PREREG_v2.md, never shipped as a result. Closest live depth findings already HONEST + consistent with the negative: grounded-honesty-axis/FINDING_depth_steering_causal headlines the construction<->retrieval axis 'correctness-INERT'; FINDING_depth_grounding_whitebox scopes depth as a grounding substrate. The get_mean_depth origin (d=0.82 recall-vs-reasoning) lives in the separate research git (pinned fc6f2c3), not here, and was pending -- never advertised in styxx. CONCLUSION: prereg-before-claim discipline meant the falsified claim was never made in public copy -> no retraction to ship; the falsification needed no public correction. No styxx-repo code changed this cycle (markdown + certificate only; suite unaffected since cycle-20's 1675-passed run).
next: Watch-item (operator-gated, OUTSIDE this repo): if the external ICML attribution-depth manuscript (memory: length-partial d=0.82->1.57) implies depth predicts answer CORRECTNESS rather than separating recall-vs-reasoning, it needs the cycle-20 caveat (AUROC 0.5468, CI straddles chance) -- not autopilot's to edit. In-repo depth-truth OWED that remains: (b) KG3 human audit of results/human_audit_sample.jsonl (flobi) to decide the TruthfulQA arm; (c) richer depth aggregation / larger model = a NEW prereg only. Carried program debt: OATH v0.4 float claim->field binding (priority #5); trigger-recall extension; big-folder in-doc receipt citations; 139-doc config-token triage.

item: OATH v0.4 float claim->field binding, last-two-segment design (standing priority #5, cycle-19 evidence attached) -- prereg with frozen bars B1-B5 committed BEFORE any certify.py change
verdict: CLOSED_NEGATIVE -- bar B3 missed, change REVERTED, nothing ships (note OATH-HELD 38/0). Design: float VERIFIED only if a value-matching leaf's LAST TWO path segments share claim-line vocabulary; binding failure -> loud ABSTAIN (never UNGROUNDED). Bars: B1 validator D1>=16 -> caught 17/20 PASS (v0.4 IMPROVED catch by 1); B2 D2=0 -> PASS; B3 battery FALSE-VERIFY <=13 -> 20 of 247 FAIL (kill); B4 all 13 cycle-18 docs UNGROUNDED=0 -> PASS; B5 suite 1675-passed -> PASS. Near-halving (26->20) is not halving; bars never move. REVERT PROVEN: certify.py byte-identical to shipped v0.3; validator re-run under revert regenerates the 3 corpus certs with ZERO git diff (D1 16/20, D2 0). MEASURED BOUNDARY: field-level binding eliminates cross-table coincidences (FALSE-VERIFY 26->20, 0.097->0.081, catch unhurt) but ALL 20 residual false-verifies are same-table SIBLINGS (corrupted row value matching another row of the same field family, plus rounding-tolerance neighbors); field vocabulary cannot separate row k=2 from row k=4 by construction. Honesty cost measured: 8 floats demoted VERIFIED->ABSTAIN on the 3-doc corpus (24->19, 42->40, 34->33), 22 on the 13-doc pool (269->247), zero manufactured UNGROUNDED. BONUS: cycle-19's in-memory battery is now a committed script (papers/autopilot/mutant_battery.py, seed 1, SHA-verified receipts) reproducing the v0.3 baseline EXACTLY: 269/58/26/182/3 -- the negative was measured by a validated instrument.
next: OATH v0.4 second attempt = claim->CELL binding (row-key aware: single-digit row labels / list indices, both invisible to current binding vocab) -- NEW prereg required, must name this negative. Also owed: trigger-vocabulary recall extension (182/269 abstain-degrade is a RECALL problem, untouched by binding); big-folder in-doc receipt citations; 139-doc config-token triage; KG3 human audit of depth-truth TruthfulQA sample (flobi).

item: OATH v0.4 trigger-vocabulary RECALL extension (the cycle-22-owed sibling of float binding): widen _TRIGGERS with the correlation/similarity register to convert the 182/269 abstain-degrade bucket into caught UNGROUNDED -- prereg with frozen bars G1-G5 committed BEFORE any certify.py change
verdict: CLOSED_NEGATIVE -- bar G3 missed, change REVERTED, nothing ships (RESULT note OATH-HELD 36/0). The extension WORKS on its own axis: battery caught 58->128 of 269 (catch rate 0.216->0.476, +70 of 182 abstain-degrades recovered) with NO false-verify regression (26 unchanged -- the feared dense-table abstain->false-verify conversion did not net occur); G1 D1=16 PASS, G2 D2=0 + false-verify 26 PASS, G4 catch>=116 -> 128 PASS, G5 suite 1675-passed PASS. But G3 (honesty gate) FIRED: re-certifying the 13 clean cycle-18 docs under the extension produced 35 clean UNGROUNDED (baseline 0), of which 6 are certifier ARTIFACTS -- a register word obligating a non-measurement number. Three unambiguous: detection_locus_gpt L64 'entropy...OpenAI caps top_logprobs at 20' (API cap 20 obligated by 'entropy'); geometry_integrity L46 'run_geometry_integrity.py (drift, stage 1) ... (2D signature, stage 2)' (stage ordinals 1/2 obligated by 'drift'). One artifact is a kill; there are six. MEASURED BOUNDARY: recall and precision are COUPLED for this register -- the same words that name a measured correlation (entropy/drift/variance/ceiling) also appear as spec constants/ordinals/'2D'; a blunt vocabulary widening buys +70 catches at 6 false accusations and the oath cannot ship false accusations. REVERT PROVEN: certify.py byte-identical to HEAD (empty diff), 3 corpus certs + _oath_mutants fixtures restored. Reproducible from the committed (reverted) tree via cycle23_recall_probe.py (monkeypatches the exact one-line change in memory, regenerates 128/26/112 + 35 clean UNGROUNDED[28 absent/1 bulk/6 artifact]). 29 of 35 are REAL doc<->receipt gaps (grid-cell correlations never persisted as summary receipts -- the tool correctly turning on older docs).
next: cycle 24 recall attempt must be RANGE-GUARDED not blunt: fire the correlation/similarity register only when the adjacent number is in a correlation's range (~[-1,1]) via the existing RANGE-SANITY unit_kw machinery -- spares API caps/stage ordinals/'2D' while still binding RSA 0.264 or reliability 0.735; NEW prereg naming this negative, re-gate G3=0 artifacts. Separately owed: the 29 REAL grid-cell gaps this cycle surfaced (persist correlations as summary receipts, or scope those docs' claims); claim->CELL float binding (cycle-22 sibling); big-folder in-doc receipt citations; 139-doc config-token triage; KG3 depth-truth TruthfulQA audit (flobi).

item: OATH v0.4 RANGE-GUARDED trigger-recall (operator: go deeper; names the cycle-23 burial): the correlation/similarity register obligates a number ONLY when value in [-1,1] -- all 6 cycle-23 artifacts were out of range. Prereg frozen+committed (f539339) BEFORE code.
verdict: CLOSED_NEGATIVE -- bar G3 missed by ONE, change REVERTED (RESULT OATH-HELD 28/0). The range guard did most of its job: clean UNGROUNDED collapsed 35->4 (2 REAL derived-RSA-bounds, 1 REAL bulk-only, 1 ARTIFACT), battery caught 128->119 of 269 (recall survives the guard, only -9), false-verify 26 unchanged; G1 D1=16, G2, G4 catch>=116->119, G5 all PASS. But G3=0 and there is ONE artifact: geometry_integrity L46 'run_geometry_integrity.py (drift, stage 1) ... stage 2' -- the ordinal 1 is obligated by 'drift' and the guard ADMITS it because 1.0 is a legal correlation (the boundary of [-1,1]); 'stage 2' was correctly spared (2 not in range), as were the 4 other cycle-23 artifacts (20/60/60/36). Range guard fixes 5 of 6; the one it can't is the integer ordinal colliding with the correlation boundary. MEASURED YIELD: a value-range guard is necessary but not sufficient -- correlations are written WITH decimals (0.264/0.98/0.735), the false positives are bare integers (stage 1/2, cap 20, 36 items, 60%); the clean separator is decimals>0, not range alone. REVERT PROVEN: certify.py byte-identical to HEAD.
next: cycle 25 = add decimals>0 to the range-guarded correlation register (obligate only fractional numbers in [-1,1]) -- removes the 'stage 1' ordinal artifact by construction while keeping every decimal correlation the recall recovers; NEW prereg naming this negative, re-gate G3=0 artifacts AND G4 catch>=116. If it passes it is the first certifier upgrade to ship since v0.3.

item: OATH v0.4 DECIMAL+RANGE-guarded trigger-recall (operator: go deeper -> break the ceiling; names the cycle-24 burial): add decimals>0 to the [-1,1] correlation-register guard -- correlations carry a fractional part, ordinals/counts/API-caps/whole-percents never do. Prereg frozen+committed (b6f5808) BEFORE code, with a frozen G3 artifact definition (measurement-domain vs not) to remove post-hoc judgment.
verdict: SHIPPED -- ALL FIVE BARS PASS (first styxx.certify upgrade since v0.3). G1 D1=16, G2 D2=0 + false-verify 26, G3 clean-UNGROUNDED artifacts=0, G4 battery caught 119>=116, G5 suite 1675-passed. Tamper-catch on the 13-doc cycle-18 mutant battery rose from the v0.3 baseline 58 to 119 of 269 (catch rate 0.216->0.442, +61 abstain-degrades recovered) with false-verify held at 26 (no regression) and ZERO certifier artifacts -- the decimals>0 clause removed the cycle-24 residual (geometry_integrity 'drift, stage 1', the integer 1 admitted at the correlation boundary 1.0) by construction while keeping every fractional correlation. The 3 clean UNGROUNDED that remain are all REAL measurement-domain provenance gaps (hand-verified per the frozen definition): ai_brain_vision derived RSA/R^2 noise-ceiling bounds no receipt holds, and a council agreement value living only in a bulk array -- the certifier correctly turning on the older docs (v0.1 bulk-exclusion design). SHIP surface: styxx/certify.py (+_TRIGGERS_CORR + one guarded bound line), 3 corpus certs regenerated by validate_oath_v0 under the new verifier SHA (D2=0 held), CHANGELOG [Unreleased]. This is the payoff of a 4-negative arc (cycle 22 float / 23 blunt / 24 range / 25 decimal), each naming the last.
next: Re-certify the 13 cycle-18 docs under the shipped verifier and repair the surfaced provenance gaps (persist bulk/derived correlations as summary receipts, or scope claims) -- this is now the concrete content of standing priority #2. Then: claim->CELL float binding (cycle-22 sibling, the false-verify bucket); quantity-specific ranges for the unbounded register words (entropy/variance>1 currently won't bind, an accepted recall limit). Operator-gated: a version bump would fold this into the next release.

item: re-certify the 13 cycle-18 docs under the shipped v0.4 verifier + repair the 2 surfaced provenance gaps via exactly-re-derivable addendum receipts (operator: let's do it -- option #1)
verdict: CLOSED_NEGATIVE -- bar R4 missed, addenda REVERTED (certs untouched). R1 PASS (all 13 OATH-HELD after repair), R3 PASS (VERIFIED only rose: vision 22->24, council 17->18, other 11 identical), R2 PASS (both addenda re-derive exactly: noise_ceiling_hi 0.5568->doc 0.56, ceiling^2 0.1555/0.3100->doc 0.16/0.31, council 2/4->0.50). But R4 FAILED: the committed mutant battery over the regenerated certs gives false-verify 28 > 26 (n_mutants 269->272 as the 3 repaired tokens become VERIFIED-and-mutated). MECHANISM: persisting the derived/definitional values as summary leaves reopens the exact float-coincidence surface cycle 22 diagnosed -- a mutated correlation elsewhere now value-matches noise_ceiling_hi / an R^2 bound / an agreement level, because floats still use value-only matching (claim->field binding is v0.4-owed, unshipped). FINDING: repair-by-summary-addendum and float claim->field binding are COUPLED -- you cannot close a provenance gap by adding a summary leaf without that leaf grounding OTHER coincidental mutants, until floats bind to their field. The 2 gaps are REAL and the addenda re-derive exactly; they simply cannot ship until claim->CELL float binding lands. certify.py unchanged.
next: the two owed items are now provably coupled: (1) claim->CELL float binding (cycle-22 sibling) must land FIRST, then (2) repair-by-addendum becomes clean (the addendum leaf grounds only its own claim). Sequence them. Meanwhile the 13 cycle-18 certs stay pinned to v0.3 SHA (re-cert under v0.4 shows the 2 real gaps but can't be repaired cleanly yet).

item: read-neq-write research (operator: do the proper research to make this truly novel): the Honesty-Knowledge Coupling Curve -- is the program's keystone read!=write EVADABLE by a realistic weight-level knowledge-preserving attacker? Prereg frozen+committed (cff3b12) with a kill-gate that can return EVADABLE. FOUNDATION stage built + run.
verdict: FOUNDATION-VALID (OATH-HELD 24/0) -- the clean-model non-degeneracy guards all pass on Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct, so the experiment is well-posed and the adversarial sweep has a real read + real knowledge to pull apart. A difference-of-means honesty direction at layer 18 (selected over L12-22: 0.60/0.73/0.81/0.85/0.83/0.81) reads true-vs-false at AUROC 0.85 on 82 DISJOINT held-out facts (random-dir 0.50 = chance); the model behaviorally knows true from false at 0.80 acc (shuffled 0.51). G-void-1 (>=0.75) PASS, G-void-2 (>=0.80) PASS, G-void-3 disjoint PASS, G-void-4 chance-floors PASS. Reuses the frozen true/false banks + residual/behavioral machinery of run_says_yes_knows_no.py. NOT the verdict -- the gate the verdict depends on; ref knowledge (0.80) locked here before any attack is trained.
next: STAGE 2 = the adversarial LoRA sweep: fine-tune Qwen2.5-1.5B with an adversarial loss that collapses the layer-18 honesty-probe separability on the 98 ATTACK facts + a knowledge-replay CE regularizer; sweep lambda; RE-LOCK the probe on the attacked model; plot the coupling curve (re-locked held-out AUROC vs held-out knowledge acc). EVADABLE iff a point hits AUROC<=0.60 with knowledge>=0.75 on >=2 seeds; else SURVIVES. Cross-family confirm on Llama-3.2-1B if budget allows. Smoke->_SMOKE_INVALID; chance-floor asserts before any verdict.

item: read-neq-write STAGE 2 -- the adversarial LoRA sweep + full-spectrum re-lock: is the keystone read!=write EVADABLE by a knowledge-preserving weight-level attacker? (operator: stay ambitious, innovate)
verdict: EVADABLE under the registered protocol (RESULT OATH-HELD 20/0) -- CONFOUND NAMED, NOT a headline crack. On Qwen2.5-1.5B, both seeds, every knowledge-preserving lambda>=0.3: a LoRA attacker (adversarial scrub on the frozen deploy probe + knowledge-replay CE) collapsed the FULL-SPECTRUM re-locked honesty read to chance (~0.46-0.53; random-dir ~0.56) while held-out knowledge held 0.80-0.89 (>=0.75). Reproduction guard passed (clean probe 0.854 / knowledge 0.805 = foundation). lambda=0 (no replay) also damages knowledge (~0.57-0.60) -> the replay regularizer is what buys the knowledge-preserving evasion. THE CONFOUND (load-bearing, surfaced in the RESULT headline): the re-lock calibrates its DoM probe on the ATTACK facts the attacker optimized against -> EVADABLE is consistent with BOTH true-erasure AND calibration-poisoning (a clean-calibrated auditor might still read honesty); this experiment cannot separate them. Per the frozen stage-3 interpretation map (committed BEFORE the number), this licenses ONLY 'a knowledge-preserving weight-level attacker can blind a DoM read calibrated on the attacked set, on this 1.5B model' -- NOT 'substrate honesty reading is dead'. Bounds: 1.5B, one family, DoM probe, LoRA-r16, n=82, seeds{0,1}.
next: E1 (mandated by frozen stage-3, fires on EVADABLE): re-run the decisive lambda with a CLEAN-CALIBRATED stronger auditor -- probe fit on a PRIVATE hold-out the attacker never saw (defeats poisoning) + logistic + whole-stack-concat read (defeats DoM-weakness) + cross-family Llama-3.2-1B. EVADABLE survives ONLY if the clean-calibrated stronger auditor also reads chance with knowledge kept, >=2 seeds, >=2 families; if the clean probe recovers the read, stage-2 was calibration-poisoning and read!=write STANDS vs this attacker. Requires saving LoRA checkpoints (stage-2 discarded them -> E1 retrains). Own prereg, own kill-gate.

item: read-neq-write E1 -- does stage-2 EVADABLE survive a CLEAN-CALIBRATED stronger auditor? (the mandated resolution of the stage-2 confound; operator: look exceptional)
verdict: POISONING_CONFIRMED -- read!=write STANDS (RESULT OATH-HELD 19/0). Stage-2 EVADABLE was CALIBRATION POISONING, not information erasure. On the decisive family Qwen2.5-1.5B (clean guard passed: clean-calibrated probe EVAL AUROC 0.938, knowledge 0.818), after the SAME knowledge-preserving attack that drove the stage-2 ATTACK-calibrated re-lock to chance (~0.47-0.51), a probe fit on a PRIVATE clean CALIB split the attacker never saw reads honesty at 0.838/0.835 (seed0) and 0.722/0.711 (seed1) -- all >=0.70 recovery bar, both seeds -- while held-out knowledge held 0.80-0.83 (rand ~0.55). The honesty signal was never erased; only a probe fit on the poisoned ATTACK set pointed the wrong way. FINDING WITH TEETH: to audit substrate honesty robustly, calibrate the probe on data the attacker did not see -- a private calibration set is the whole difference between reading chance and reading 0.72-0.84 on the SAME attacked weights. CAVEATS (kept, not dropped): (1) cross-family INCOMPLETE -- Llama-3.2-1B VOIDs its non-degeneracy guard (clean knowledge 0.788 < 0.80 by 0.012); its points corroborate directionally (clean-calib recovers 0.67-0.75) but the confirmed result is single-family Qwen. (2) 'STANDS' = vs THIS attacker (LoRA r16/300 steps/DoM-targeted scrub), NOT unbreakable -- full-FT + adaptive-attacker (scrub the clean-calib distribution too) are frozen stage-3 E2/E3. Vindicates the discipline: stage-2 had a headline-ready 'we broke read!=write' and the pre-committed interpretation map forbade claiming it + named the experiment that overturned it.
next: E1' clean cross-family confirmation (Llama split that clears the 0.80 knowledge guard, or a larger model) -- single-family is the one open flank. Then frozen stage-3 E2 (full fine-tune attacker) / E3 (adaptive attacker targeting the clean-calibration distribution). The methodological finding (private-calibration defense against probe poisoning) is itself publishable + wire-able into styxx.mount (re-lock on private data).

item: read-neq-write E3 -- does the private-calibration defense survive an ADAPTIVE attacker that knows it? (operator: take it farther, think huge)
verdict: DEFENSE_HOLDS -- read!=write STANDS vs an adaptive-scheme attacker, TWO families (RESULT OATH-HELD 31/0). Both families cleared clean guards this run (Qwen 0.912/0.800, Llama 0.821/0.800), closing E1's single-family flank. Adaptive attacker re-fits a moving DoM probe on its MIMIC split every 25 steps + scrubs along it (never the auditor's private CALIB); after it, the clean-calibrated auditor still recovers honesty at 0.73-0.78 both families, knowledge preserved, ~equal to the NAIVE control (which reproduced E1). LOAD-BEARING CAVEAT (flagged, not smuggled): the prereg's 'adaptive must actually bite' guard was UNMEASURED -- the harness didn't log the frozen-deployed read, so I cannot confirm the adaptive scheme was strictly STRONGER than naive (adaptive~naive ~0.73-0.79). So E3 shows the defense holds vs THIS adaptive scheme, NOT that it beats the strongest adaptive attacker; E3' logging the deployed-read delta is owed before the 'vs adaptive' claim fully firms. Also: Qwen adaptive seed1 knowledge dipped 0.733<0.75 (not KP) -> decisive hold rests on seed0 (0.782@0.833), Llama corroborates both seeds. Scope: LoRA-r16/300-step/DoM-target/1.5B-1B.
next: E3' -- log the frozen-deployed-read delta (adaptive vs naive) to VERIFY the adaptive attacker bit harder (the one claim E3 could not earn); then E2 (full fine-tune attacker, >=800 steps, disjoint-capability knowledge invariant). Productize: wire private-calibration re-locking into styxx.mount (the transferable defense). Arc now = foundation->stage2 EVADABLE->E1 poisoning/STANDS->E3 STANDS vs adaptive scheme (2 families).

item: read-neq-write E3''' -- does dropping the frozen anchor let the adaptive attacker finally BITE (and if so does read!=write survive)? Names the E3'' VOID_NO_BITE burial; applies the mechanistic fix E3'' handed forward (pure-moving whole-stack MIMIC scrub only). Prereg frozen+committed (814947f) before retrain, bite-gated, able to return DEFENSE_BROKEN.
verdict: VOID_NO_BITE -- the pure-moving adaptive attacker (frozen anchor removed, whole-stack re-fit-every-10 MIMIC scrub only) STILL did not bite (RESULT OATH-HELD 54/9/0). Decisive Qwen2.5-1.5B: adaptive left the frozen-deployed read at 0.624/0.664 vs naive 0.400/0.445 and the mimic-refit read at 0.749/0.682 vs naive 0.432/0.467 -- MORE legible on both; delta_frozen=-0.222, delta_mimic=-0.266, attack_bit=false. The pre-committed bite gate blocked a false STANDS (adaptive clean-calib read came in HIGH at 0.806/0.728 precisely because the attack barely touched the signal). Clean guards passed both families (Qwen calib 0.912/know 0.800, Llama 0.821/0.817); naive control reproduced E1/E3 (clean-calib 0.786/0.775 @ knowledge 0.833/0.817). THREE independent adaptive escalations (E3' refit-25 deploy-layer, E3'' two-term whole-stack, E3''' pure-moving whole-stack) now all fail to out-attack the naive static scrub -> within this difference-of-means objective family at LoRA r16/300-step/1.5B-1B, the naive static attacker is empirically the STRONGEST threat and adaptive complexity is self-defeating. E3''s mechanistic hypothesis (frozen/moving gradient conflict was the sole cause) FALSIFIED: a moving DoM reference re-fit every 10 steps never converges at this budget, so even the single-objective pure-moving scheme is toothless. Adaptive robustness stays formally OPEN; v27's STANDS-vs-naive-and-strong demotion unchanged and correct -- E3''' neither re-earns nor breaks the adaptive claim.
next: E3'''' (NEW prereg naming this VOID_NO_BITE) IF the adaptive lane is pursued: make the reference STATIONARY within a bite -- scrub a probe fit ONCE on a large MIMIC pool and hold it many steps, OR extend to >=800 steps so a moving target can be chased to convergence, OR a learned linear-probe adversary outside the DoM family. Alternative (recommended): STOP the adaptive lane (3 consecutive NO_BITEs = strong evidence this objective family cannot build a biting attacker) and pivot to B2 (RMU/gradient-routing unlearning of the gold subspace + knowledge-replay -- the real read!=write test, Tier-1 QUEUED) or standing-priority #2 (45 UNBOUND finding docs / 13 cycle-18 provenance repair).

item: GPU held by in-flight scored run (calib-poison-general sentiment attack pid 5480, 7.2/8.2GB) -> CPU-only receipt-binding cycle (standing priority #2): bind an UNBOUND finding doc against its OWN experiment receipts, honest bar (<=4 single-experiment receipts, no 200-receipt sieve). No new scored run fired (never contend); no prereg (attestation of an existing finding, not a scored experiment).
verdict: BOUND -- FINDINGS_rhythm_substrate_2026_06_03.md certifies OATH-HELD (verified=21, UNGROUNDED=0, CONTRADICTED=0, abstained=28) against its 3 own receipts (llm_rhythm_result.json, ssm_contrast_raw.json, ssm_contrast_result.json). verifier_sha matches shipped certify.py (UNCHANGED -> no validate_oath_v0 re-run owed). Certify/oath tests 17 passed CPU-forced (CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES='', zero contention with the scored GPU run). MEASURED CEILING of standing priority #2: of 201 UNBOUND FINDING/RESULT docs (excl. in-flight calib-poison-general/), only 15 sit in honest small (<=4 receipt) folders and only THIS one certifies clean today; NEAR misses (consensus-truth-engine UNG=1; triviaqa/kbc/holdout-gate UNG=2; convergence/capstone/curve UNG=3; all CONTRADICTED=0) fail purely on certifier-precision config-token false positives (bare 0 in '>0'/'~=0', model-size ranges '2-3B', prose counts '4 of 6') -- NOT doc errors; did not doctor prose to pass. Repair-by-summary-receipt stays blocked on float->CELL binding (cycle 26).
next: Two forks off the measured ceiling: (a) a certifier-PRECISION prereg for the unambiguous false-positive classes -- comparison-0 ('>0'/'~=0'), config-range ('2-3B'), and 'N of M' prose counts -- the safe extension of cycle-18's arXiv-ID-skip idea; re-gate via validate_oath_v0.py with bars frozen, prove no recall regression + no false-verify on the 13-doc battery; (b) doc-named-receipt binding for the big folders (grounded-honesty-axis n~70, frequency-resonance n~14): parse each doc's cited JSON filenames and ground against exactly those (honest, non-sieve) -- the timed-out scan proves this needs a persistent-process scanner, not subprocess-per-doc. Also standing: when GPU frees, cycle-31's recommended pivot to B2 (RMU/gradient-routing unlearning) remains the top decisive open experiment.

item: honesty-side probe-parity check (the sentiment control's Next #1: the single most load-bearing unrun experiment) -- does the flagship read!=write recovery attribute to PRIVACY (clean fit split) or PROBE CAPACITY (13-family incl. whole-stack)? GPU free (463/8188MiB, no scored run). Prereg frozen+committed (a617eca) BEFORE the retrain.
verdict: PRIVACY_PARTIAL__between_bars (RESULT OATH-HELD 68/0). Identical E1-regime honesty attack (Qwen2.5-1.5B, lam=1.0, seeds {0,1}, 300 steps, deploy-18 scrub + knowledge-replay) on E1's three-way split; three auditors via one shared 13-family code path. Reproduction EXACT: private-13 matched E1's canonical Qwen lam=1 reads to 4 decimals on BOTH cells (0.8378 s0 / 0.7217 s1, delta_vs_canonical 0.0 each); naive-DoM-6 reproduced the collapse (0.5106/0.4876 vs attack_sweep 0.5066/0.4725); frozen-18 bit 0.8562->0.5502/0.5899; knowledge held 0.8182/0.803. THE SWAP: upgrade the naive auditor from 6-feature DoM to the SAME 13-probe family (per-layer DoM + per-layer logistic + whole-stack) fit on a frozen n=53=|CALIB| subsample of the attacker's OWN poisoned ATTACK split (probe family AND fit-size matched; only fit-split differs). It recovered 0.7825 (s0) / 0.8037 (s1) of the 0.8378/0.7217 private read. baseline_gap 0.3272/0.2341 -> parity_gap 0.0553/-0.082: parity removed ~83pct of the seed-0 gap and >100pct of seed-1 (the poisoned-fit parity auditor BEAT the clean-fit private one). Verdict PARTIAL (frozen conjunction, discordant cells): STANDS refused (parity_gap << 0.5*baseline both cells); FAILS refused ONLY because seed 0 kept a ~0.035 privacy residual (private 0.8378 > matched13 0.8178 bar), while seed 1 satisfies FAILS outright. CROSS-CONSTRUCT CONVERGENCE: same string as the sentiment margin/parity control (07-10), from opposite starting magnitudes (sentiment small gap 0.11-0.13 ~2/3 removed; honesty large gap 0.23-0.33 ~83pct+ removed) -> the flagship's 'privacy' attribution is PROBE-CAPACITY-DOMINATED on BOTH tested constructs; the clean fit-split buys at most a small one-of-two-seeds residual. Per the frozen sequencing rail NO erratum ships from this run alone (FAILS did not fire; PARTIAL did) -- but demotion pressure now sits on both constructs.
next: CONFIRMATION RUN is now the top owed item, before B2: new frozen prereg re-running this shared parity code path at >=3 seeds + a lambda sweep {1.0, 3.0} + the Llama-3.2-1B family. If FAILS consolidates there it inherits THIS prereg's frozen re-attribution language (protocol clause moves from 'calibrate on a private split' to 'audit with a richer probe family that recovers even fit on poisoned data') and opens the operator-gated erratum path to the published read!=write claim (Fathom v26/v28). Only after the attribution is correctly named on >=3 seeds does B2 (RMU/gradient-routing erasure attacker) make sense -- no point stress-testing a defense whose mechanism is mis-attributed. GOTCHA carried: bare derived numbers (e.g. a FAILS-margin residual not stored in the receipt JSON) certify UNGROUNDED -- state derived quantities via their grounded operands or drop the bare figure.

item: attribution confirmation part (i): does cycle-33's lone seed-0 privacy residual survive >=3 seeds + a lambda sweep? Qwen2.5-1.5B, seeds {0,1,2} x lambda {1.0,3.0} = 6 cells, 300 steps, via honesty_parity_confirm.py which IMPORTS honesty_parity_control.py (byte-identical shared parity code path). Prereg frozen+committed (79fba7a) BEFORE the retrain, with a two-thirds-majority aggregate and STANDS written as reachable as FAILS.
verdict: PARTIAL_CONSOLIDATED__residual_real_but_not_robust (RESULT OATH-HELD 82/0). N_admissible=6 (all bit + knowledge-preserving), FAILS-cells=2, STANDS-cells=0, majority=4, median baseline_gap=0.2793, median parity_gap=0.0516, mean parity_gap=0.0091. The 2 cells shared with cycle 33 (s0/s1 lam=1) reproduced ALL THREE auditor reads to 4 decimals (delta_vs_cy33=0.0 on naive-DoM-6, naive-MATCHED-13, private-13) -> importing the cycle-33 harness gives a byte-identical code path across a fresh process. STRUCTURE not noise: seeds 0 and 2 hold a small POSITIVE privacy residual at BOTH lambda (parity_gap 0.0553/0.0479 s0; 0.0645/0.0553 s2), seed 1 REVERSES it at both (parity_gap -0.082/-0.0866, poisoned-fit parity auditor beats clean-fit private). It is a SEED effect, NOT a lambda effect: within every seed |delta parity_gap| <= 0.0092 across lambda 1->3 (stronger knowledge-replay does not change the attribution). So the parity swap removes ~4/5 of the honesty gap on EVERY cell (dominantly probe capacity: per-layer logistic + whole-stack recover the read even fit on the attacker's poisoned split), leaving a small (~0.05 AUROC ~ 0.8 SE at EVAL n=66) genuine privacy-specific residual on two of three seeds, reversed on the third -- too small for the half-baseline STANDS bar, not consistently <=0.02 for FAILS. THREE probe-parity runs now agree (sentiment PARTIAL, honesty-lam1 PARTIAL cycle 33, honesty-3seed PARTIAL_CONSOLIDATED cycle 34): the flagship read!=write private>naive gap is CAPACITY-DOMINATED with a small seed-dependent privacy residual. SEQUENCING: FAILS did NOT consolidate (2 of 6, needed 4) -> the operator-gated erratum path stays CLOSED; the correct update is a SCOPE NOTE (the 'calibrate on a private split' clause is minor-but-real, ~1/5 of the gap), NOT a retraction. Cleaner than either a hasty erratum or an unearned vindication.
next: Part (ii): Llama-3.2-1B cross-family through the SAME shared code path (new frozen prereg). E1's Llama clean guard was borderline (knowledge 0.788 < 0.80) so the prereg MUST pre-commit a guard-fail->VOID_HPCF branch. Only a cross-family FAILS could re-open the (still operator-gated) erratum path; a cross-family PARTIAL/STANDS closes the attribution as 'capacity-dominant, small real seed-dependent privacy residual' for good. THEN B2 (RMU/gradient-routing erasure attacker) -- the mechanism is now named well enough (capacity-dominant + small real lambda-insensitive privacy residual) to stress-test it honestly. GOTCHA reconfirmed: bare 'N of 3'/'N of M' prose counts certify UNGROUNDED when the integer isn't a stored scalar (seeds are 0/1/2, no scalar '3') -- spell out small counts as words; '2 of 6'/'4 of 6' DO bind (n_fails_cells/majority_threshold/n_admissible are receipt scalars).
